steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: ”While some commentators lauded... less ______ observers countered...” The first group holds an optimistic view (transparency is good). The second group holds a critical, pessimistic view (blogs exacerbate polarization). The word “less” indicates we need a positive quality that the critical group lacks.

steps.title: Apply sanguine to the contrast
steps.content: Sanguine means optimistic or hopeful. The observers who countered are less optimistic, so “less sanguine” directly describes them. The other choices don't address the optimism-pessimism contrast at all. That matches choice C — C is correct.
